name: ida_ping
description: Check IDA bridge. Returns markdown: optional Warning if plugin is legacy, then a json fenced block. JSON is enriched by the stdio MCP: bridge_capabilities, stdio_mcp_enrichment; when legacy plugin_version: null and supported_ops: []. include_paths=false redacts idb/input_file for shared logs. Raw IDA HTTP GET /health matches POST ping only (no MCP enrichment).

include_paths.title: Include Paths
include_paths.description: If false, idb and input_file are shown as <redacted> in the JSON block.

result.title: Result
result.description: Markdown string. Inner JSON includes ok, idb, input_file; plugin v2+ adds plugin_version (string), supported_ops (string[]). MCP adds bridge_capabilities, stdio_mcp_enrichment; legacy plugins show null and [] for version/ops.
